description: Lock military_map_rooms to the 1688 Depot de la Guerre military map archive scope and prevent old generic atlas, naval-logbook, and engineer-corps edges from returning.

checks.reason: The source-backed scope is the Depot de la Guerre created by Louvois in 1688.
The source-backed mechanism is military map production and cartographic/topographic function.
The Depot conserved military-domain documents as a state archive office.
Engineering and artillery schooling is shared military-technical context, not a strict enabling cause.
Bound printed atlases are narrower than the Depot's broader cartographic bureau and archive scope.
Naval voyage logbooks are outside the corrected land-war map archive scope.
The corrected 1688 Depot node cannot be a prerequisite for the 1614 military engineer-corps node.
